pageContext.name: X-Men #1
pageContext.description: Attacks may come from above or below, but they always come. Luckily, the X-Men moved to town.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the X-Men #1 Fine Art Print, a Marvel Comics art print by artist Felipe Massafera.  It is the nature of mutants to evolve, illustrated here in this colorful collage composition celebrating X-Men across the eras. Professor Xavier is surrounded by some of his most prolific students demonstrating their extraordinary abilities, including Storm, Rogue, Beast, Psylocke, Cyclops, Colossus, Gambit, Jean Grey, Wolverine, Forge, and Jubilee. Set against a background of classic comics panels, this powerful team isn't to be underestimated, even in a world that looks down on them.  Originally created as a retailer exclusive variant cover for X-Men #1 (2021), written by Gerry Duggan for Marvel Comics, this comic book artwork is now available as a fine art collectible for fans. Each X-Men #1 Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this super hero artwork is a must-have addition to any fan's X-Men collection.  Unlock your true potential and team up with the X-Men #1 Fine Art Print by Felipe Massafera today!
